summary: Hide gameplay UI when results screen appears.
Hide gameplay UI when results screen appears.

Move the ResultsPanel.SetActive(true) call to occur immediately before updating child UI elements and texts, guaranteeing the UI is visible and its canvas state is properly refreshed when updating contents. This ensures correct text update and prevents cases where inactive panels prevent visual updates.
Added a null check for PlayerState.PersistentInvasives in the results summary construction to prevent an empty ScoreSummaryText or errors when the Invasives list is not set.
After activating ResultsPanel in ShowResults, force a Canvas/RectTransform layout rebuild so the UI reflects changes even if updated while inactive.
